parameters.query: SELECT id as tenant_id FROM tenants WHERE plan IN ('enterprise', 'scale')

SELECT t.id as touchpoint_id, t.tenant_id, t.visitor_id, t.referrer, t.timestamp, t.page_url, t.device FROM touchpoints t LEFT JOIN ai_referrals ar ON ar.tenant_id = t.tenant_id AND ar.visitor_id = t.visitor_id AND ar.timestamp = t.timestamp WHERE t.tenant_id = {{ $json.tenant_id }} AND t.referrer IS NOT NULL AND ar.id IS NULL AND (t.referrer ILIKE '%chatgpt.com%' OR t.referrer ILIKE '%chat.openai.com%' OR t.referrer ILIKE '%perplexity.ai%' OR t.referrer ILIKE '%claude.ai%' OR t.referrer ILIKE '%anthropic.com%' OR t.referrer ILIKE '%gemini.google.com%' OR t.referrer ILIKE '%bard.google.com%' OR t.referrer ILIKE '%copilot.microsoft.com%' OR t.referrer ILIKE '%bing.com/chat%' OR t.medium = 'ai_referral')

INSERT INTO ai_referrals (tenant_id, visitor_id, ai_source, referrer_url, landing_page, device, timestamp) VALUES ({{ $json.tenant_id }}, {{ $json.visitor_id }}, '{{ $json.ai_source }}', '{{ $json.referrer }}', '{{ $json.page_url }}', '{{ $json.device }}', '{{ $json.timestamp }}') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

parameters.content:
## AI Referral Detection

Detects visitors arriving from AI sources:
- ChatGPT (chatgpt.com, chat.openai.com)
- Perplexity (perplexity.ai)
- Claude (claude.ai, anthropic.com)
- Gemini (gemini.google.com, bard.google.com)
- Copilot (copilot.microsoft.com, bing.com/chat)

Also checks UTM medium = 'ai_referral'.
Links to orders if visitor converted.
